Rus. aṅḍolī , E. reṅ'ḍī, reṅṛī , Tir. aṅ'ḍī , n. f. 1. The fruit of the Ricinus communis . 2. A kind of fire work; the shell of the castor-oil seed charged with powder. arandī kā tel , n. Castor-oil, used medicinally and for burning.

adj. Twisted; contorted; displaced; drawn on one side; distorted. Nāf nale aṛaṅg baṛaṅg ho gaë . Wom.
n. f. Nonsensical talk; gibberish; empty babble. Kyoṅ aṛaṅg taṛaṅg baktā hai?
s.m. Obstruction; obstacle, impediment; prop, support, buttress; — entangling the legs so as to trip (in wrestling); tripping or giving a cross-buttock (in wrestling)
more: s. m. 1. A mode of wrestling with the feet. 2. An obstacle.
subs: (-ko), To have an adversary in such a position (in wrestling) that it is easy to throw him; to have on the hip, have an advantage over; to bring under one's thumb; to trick, circumvent
or de-mārnā, To throw one by tripping, or across the hip
(-meṅ), To place an obstacle (in the way of), to hinder, impede; to place a prop (under), to prop up, support
aṛangā lagānā, v.t. To trip up.

def: n. m. 1. An obstacle; impediment; obstruction. 2. A prop; support; buttress; a piece of timber, etc. inserted to raise a thatched, or tiled roof. 3. The leg trick in wrestling. Aṛaṅge pe chaṛhā-ke de mārā. aṛaṅge par chaṛhānā , v. a. 1. To bring under one's thumb; to trick; circumvent; dupe; hocus; trepan. Kisī Nawāb ko aṛaṅge pe chaṛhāö jo hāth raṅge jāëṅ . 2. To nearly throw one with the leg trick. Aise baṛe pahilwān ko aṛaṅge pe chaṛhā lȳā. aṛaṅge pe mārnā , v. a. To throw one with the leg trick. Uṭhā-ke aṛaṅge pe de mārā. aṛaṅgā mār'nā,—lagā'nā , v. a. 1. To impede; cast an obstacle in the way. Hote huāte kām meṅ aṛaṅgā lagā dȳā . 2. To support; prop; bolster up. Chhappar meṅ aṛaṅgā lagā do . 3. To trip up; to strike from under the body. Maiṅ ne jo aṛaṅgā lagāyā auṅdhe * -mūṅh āyā .
s.f. Nonsensical talk, gibberish; folly ( = aṛ-baṛ)
subs: v.n. To talk nonsense, to prate; to rave.

from अलस Idle, lazy) s. m. Idleness, laziness, inactivity.

s.m. = ارش پرش arś-parś, q.v. s.m. Touching; touch, contact; partial bathing, throwing a little water on the head with one's hand; sprinkling, aspersion; defilement or impurity arising from contact (with anything unclean)
more: n. m. S. स्पर्ष to become wet. 1. Sprinkling; immersion; partial bathing; throwing a little water on the head with the hand. 2. Impurity from touch; pollution. Musalmān se aras paras ho gayā .
s. m. 1. Partial bathing (throwing a very little water on the head with oneʼs hand instead of bathing), sprinkling or aspersion. 2. Act of touching.
subs: (or aras-paras) honā or ho-jānā (-se), To be touched (by) and thus rendered impure, to be defiled or polluted (by).

ety: ā+Pehl. rāst; rt. Z. rād = S. राध्
def: adj. Prepared; arranged, disposed; well-ordered, well-regulated; regular; improved; adorned, embellished, decorated, bedecked (with); dressed; equipped
more: adj. Prepared, dressed, adorned, embellished, arranged, regular, improved.
subs: adj. Bedecked, adorned with jewels, &c.; equipped

v.t. To prepare, get ready; to put in order, arrange, dispose, adjust, regulate, settle; to draw up in order (an army), to array; to collect, group; to adorn, ornament, decorate, embellish, beautify, grace.

def: s.f. Preparation; putting in order, arrangement, disposition, adjustment; regularity, order; decoration, ornament, embellishment.
more: n. f. اَراستن to arrange, adorn. 1. Preparation; arrangement; disposition ( taīyārī ). 2. Regularity; order; adjustment ( tartīb ). 3. Decoration; ornament; embellishment ( sajāvaṭ ).
s. f. Preparation, decoration, ornament, regularity, arrangement, disposition, improvement, refinement, amendment.

def: adj. 1. Prepared ( taīyār ); arranged; dressed; improved; regular. Sawārī ārāstah hai . 2. Decked out; embellished; adorned ( sajā huā ). ārāstah pairāstah , adj. 1. Decked out; be-jewelled; got up. Zewar se ārāstah pairāstah ho-kar, Bādshāh pās pauṅhchī . 2. Equipped; accoutred; armed ( musallah ). ārāstah kar'nā , v. a. 1. To form; frame; dispose; set, or put in order; arrange; reduce to order ( tartīb k .). Kitāboṅ ko ārāstah kar-ke lagāo . 2. To fix; settle; set, or put right; adjust ( ṭhīk k .). 3. To collect; marshal; array; range; group; assort; sort; bring into order. Muqāble ko fauj ārāstah kī . 4. To mature; organize; prepare. 5. To adorn; ornament; beautify; decorate; deck; bedeck; garnish; set out; set off; embellish; grace ( sajānā ). Jhāṛ fānūs se makān ārāstah kar dȳā .
s.m. Insipidity, want of flavour; spiritlessness.

= آڙهت āṛhat, q.v. s.m. f. (?), A well-wheel, the (so-called) Persian wheel (a string of earthen pots attached to a revolving wheel over a well, which go down empty and come up full and tilt the water into a trough: — The commoner form of the word is رهٿ rahaṭ).
corr. for ارتهہ arth, q.v.

n. m. S. अर्थ to desire, Pālī. attho, aṭṭho . 1. Motive; purpose; intention; design; intent ( irādah ). Raurā, kaun arth ke āil bānī? Bhoj. Sir, what brings you here? * Koī kar le , Get a wife. 2. Sense; meaning; import ( mānī ). 3. Matter; substance; stuff ( māddah ). 4. Property; wealth; effects ( māl ). Hamrā arth rahait, takhan tīrath jaītoṅ . Tir. Had I money, then I should have gone on a pilgrimage. 5. Fruit; result; effect ( phal ). Dauṛal aëlīṅ, kichhau na arth niksal . Bhoj. I came running, but nothing came of it. 6. Value; importance; benefit ( fāëdā ). 7. Reason; account; sake ( sabab ). Āṅhāṅ kaun arth ke het āël chhī? Tir. What has brought you here, Sir? 8. Business; concern; affair. 9. ( In law ) a suit or action ( muqadmā ). arth batā'nā,—batlā'nā,—k. , v. a. To give the meaning; to explain ( mānī batānā ). arth bichār'nā,—nikāl'nā , v. a. To make out the sense or meaning; to understand; interpret. — bhed , n. m. Difference of meaning; discrimination of words. arth de'nā,—rakh'nā , v. a. To denote; mean; express. shabd arth , A. lafzī mānī , n. Literal meaning; primary meaning.
s.m. Enemy, foe.
W. Hin. v. n. To have the menses, or monthly course.

An attendant who runs before a pālkī , or other conveyance of his master. ardal'ī utar'nā , v. n. To copulate (several men with one woman successively). 1. Is ranḍī pe ardalī utar gaī, aur use khabar nahīṅ . 2. Nahīṅ saukan pe ardalī utrī. Gid haiṅ murde pe be-shumār gire . Wom. Jān. Sāhab. No co-wife she, nor men were they who on her fell, Say rather countless vultures on a carcase fell.

ety: S. अर्दना+आशम्; but cf. with عرض داشت, of which it is prob. a corr.
def: s.f. Representation, petition, request, entreaty; supplication; offering (to a deity)
more: n. f. S. अर्द् to ask, आशा, , H. ās hope. 1. Application; petition; request; entreaty. Sun, mōṭī ke dīule, sun merī ardās, Āj milāwā piū kā, tū jalyo sārī rāt . Wom. Play. List tiny earthen lamp, O list my heart's desire, This night my husband comes, keep bright all night thy fire. 2. An offering to a deity. — kar'nā , v. a. 1. To petition; implore; beseech; ask; solicit; importune; request. 2. To worship; offer sacrifice; pray; adore. Sab sīs nivā ardās karo, aur har dam bolo, "Wāh Gurū!" Nazīr. All bow your heads, and pray, and cry continually "Great is the Gurū (Nānak)."
s. f. Representation, offering to a deity. (Perhaps a corruption of عرضداشت).
subs: v.t. To petition, solicit, request, entreat, beseech; to worship; to pray.

1. adj. One afflicted with hemiplegia. 2. s. f. A wife.

n. f. 1. One's better half; a wife. Bāṅdar ek nisācharī lāyo, karī apnī ardhaṅgī, Lāl Dās, Raghunāth dayā se, utpann bhaë Phirangī. Dohā . Lāl Dās. A demon of the night, a monkey once did trace. He took her for a wife. By Ragunāth's good grace, The issue of this union was the English race. ☞ It is a popular belief among the Hindus that Rāmchandar pronounced a blessing ( bar ) on the army of monkeys with whose aid he obtained a victory over Rāvan, the demon king, to the effect that their issue should reign in the Kal-jug or Iron age. 2. One affected with the palsy. 3. An appellation of Shiv. 4. A sloven; slattern; slut ( huṛdaṅgī ). Ek nār dekhī ardh-aṅgī, rākhe ṭāṅge ādhī naṅgī, Jo dhoban kartī hai kām, so hī wā tiryā kā nām . Conundrum. Ans. Dhotī . Her legs half bare, I saw a slattern dame, The work the laundress does will give her name.
adj. Wet, moist, damp.

more: n. f. Pālī. addā , One of the lunar mansions ( ādrā ).
s. f. Name of one of the lunar mansions, which see under آدرا ādrā.

yes, of course, no doubt; but, however
are-re, interj. (dakh.) Alas: see اري are.
intj. (used chiefly in calling to or addressing inferiors), Holla! ho! O! Sirrah! hark ye!
more: intj. S. रे, Pr. are . Hollo! ho! Ho there. (Used chiefly in addressing inferiors) Arī! kahāṅ jālī hai? are Rām , Good gracious! my God! Heavens! Guftam ki "yake bosah lab-i-lāl-i-to gīram," Guftā, ki "Are Rām! Turak kāiṅ kare chhe!" Amīr Khusro. I said, "one kiss from your red lips I'd have" —whereat, She cried "O Ram! what is this Turk now going at!" ☞ This form of Poetry, in which the lines are alternately Persian and Hindī, began with the poet Amīr Khusro , the celebrated author of numerous riddles, who lived in the 14th century. Every second line, which is in Hindī, is meant to ridicule the strange language of the Hindus, as it appeared to their foreign Mahomedan conquerors. are are , Good God! don't! what are you about! Are, are! kyā kartā hai! are taṛe, yā aṛe taṛe k . v. a. See abe tabe .
subs: intj. Good gracious! O dear, O dear! What are you about!
intj. Alas! O dear! Woe's me!

def: = H آڙي آنا आड़ेआना āṛe-ānā, see aṛe, s.v. اڙا aṛā.
more: v. n. To protect, to become a protection.

def: = H اڙي آنا अड़ेआना aṛe-ānā, see aṛe, s.v. اڙا aṛā.
v.s.v. P. آرے are.
more: n. m. Evasion; shuffling; putting off (ṭāl maṭol). Āre bale na karo, de do .

def: adv. On this side and that; right and left. (See ār-pār.)
s.f. Wealth; property; effects.
W. Hin. n. f. Wealth; property; assets; chattels.
adj. compar. & super. (of رفيع rafīʻ), Higher; highest; very high; most exalted; sublime.
more: adj. compar. (of رفیع) Most exalted, very high.

more: adj. An obstinate heretick; particularly, a bigotted Shīʼaﻌ.

def: adj. = الگا algā, q.v. adj. Separate, apart, distinct; free, loose, unconfined, &c. (see alag): — s.m. A sandal.
s.f. = الگائي algāʼī, q.v. s.f. Separation; holding or keeping aloof, non-interference; being silent.
s.m. A perfume of a yellowish colour compounded of several scented ingredients: (One receipt specifies sandal, rose-water, camphor, musk, ambergris and butter as the ingredients).
more: n. m. A perfume of a yellowish colour, composed of several scented ingredients. Ādhā arnā, sārā hāthī, Jin ne pāyā, lāyā chhātī . Charade. Ans. Ar-gajā . One half a buffalo wild, joined with an elephant whole's my name, By whomsoever I was met, upon his breast I came.
s. m. Name of a perfume of a yellowish colour and compounded of several scented ingredients.

def: adj. Dyed with argajā (garments, &c.).
s.m. A wooden bolt or pin for fastening a door; a bar.
s.m. An organ.
v.t. = الگانا algānā, q.v. v.t. = alag karnā, q.v.s.v. alag; to put on one side; to put up, raise.
more: v. a. S. अ not, लग् to adhere. * Pierced. 1 āī nā came not. 2 pāī nā found not. 3 ār shame, sī like. To separate; put on one side; set apart.
1. v. a. To separate, to put on one side. 2. v. n. To be separated, to be set apart.

def: s.f. = الگني alganī, q.v.
more: Tir. n. f. S. अ not, लग् to stick, H. al'ag separate. A rope stretched across a room, or a rod or bamboo suspended horizontally for hanging or drying clothes on.
s. m. A rope stretched, or a wooden rod or bamboo placed horizontally, for drying clothes on or for similar purposes.

def: s.m. An organ,
s.m. A plant whose flowers and fruit are of a beautiful red (Arbor Judæa); red colour, crimson; purple.
more: s. m. A plant whose flowers and fruit are of a beautiful red; a red colour.

def: adj. Red, crimson; purple.
more: adj. Of a red colour, purple.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian ارغوانی (arġawānī). By surface analysis, ارغوان (arġavān) + ـی (-ī).

def: s.m. A mode of worship; libation; a respectful offering of various ingredients to a god or a Brāhman; — price, cost
more: s. m. 1. (or aragh ) Mode of worship; an oblation of eight ingredients made to a god or brāhman. 2. Price, cost.
subs: (or aragh) ćaṛhānā, ćaṛhā-denā, (-ko), To make an oblation to a deity, &c.

def: s.m. A small boat-shaped vessel used by the Hindūs in their devotions, for performing libations.
more: s. m. A vessel shaped like a boat, used by the Hindūs for making libation in their devotions.

def: W. Rus. adj. S. अ not, रघ् to move. Lazy; indolent.
s.m. Rubbish, &c. ( = āṛā-goṛā); transactions, dealings; account.
n. m. Account; transaction ( leṅ deṅ ); dealings.
violet
s.f. A kind of fish. (Cf. aṛwāṛī).
adj. Two and a half; two and a half times (e.g. aṛhāʼī sau, two and a half times 100, or 100X2½); — s.f. A full galop.
more: adj. Two and a half, (when used with a noun of number) twice and half (the aggregate number). s. f. A full gallop.

def: adj. S. श्रर्द्ध + द्वय. Two and a half.
n. f. 1. A measure of two and a half seers. 2. The multiplication table ( pahāṛā ) of 2½ times. E. ( ḍhauṅchā ).
s.f. A weight or measure of two and a half seers; the multiplication table or pahārā of 2½ times.
more: part. (from اوڙهنا) A wearer or putter on of a dress.
s. m. A weight of two and a half sers, a measure containing two and a half sers.

def: adj. compar. & super. (of رحيم raḥīm), More, most, or very merciful or compassionate
more: adj. compar. (of رحیم) More or most merciful. ارحم الراحمین arḥamu-r-rāḥimīn, The most merciful of the merciful (an attribute of God).
subs: The most merciful of the merciful (an attribute of God).

def: s.m. pl. (of رحم rěḥm), Wombs, matrices; relations by the mother's side, uterine kindred.
more: s. plur. (of رحم) 1. Wombs, matrices. 2. Relations by the motherʼs side, uterine kindred.

def: s.m. = اڐهانا aḍhānā, and اڙانا aṛānā, q.v. s.m. One of the thirty-six Rāginīs that are played or sung during the night only. (Also written aṛhānā and aṛānā).
E. v. a. To order; command; bid; direct ( hukm k .). Nā karī kahalyā, kaunoṅ ṭahal aṛhaibā . Bhoj. Song. Lāonī . He will not do what you tell him, no matter what task you set him.
more: v. a. Caus. of oṛhnā , S. ऊर्ण to cover. To put on (a cloak or shawl); to cover; help to dress.

def: s.m. A Buddha; a Jain saint; a holy person (a follower of Buddha).
n. m. S. अरि enemy, हन् to kill, Pālī. arham, lit . One who destroys his enemies (passions). An appellation of Jain gods.
s.f. A species of pulse, Cajanus Indicus: (Syn. توأر tūʼar).
more: s. f. A species of pulse (Cytisus cajan), called also توار tūʼar.

def: s.f. A species of pulse, Cajanus Indicus: (Syn. توأر tūʼar).
= ارهر arhar, q.v. s.f. A species of pulse, Cajanus Indicus: (Syn. توأر tūʼar).

E. n. f. S. आढकी. A species of pulse; Cytisus cajan , Wat. Cajanus flavus. Rahrī rahrī, suruk rahrī; Ḍolī meṅ kī kanyā hamār mehrī . Boys' rhyme. Rahrī, rahrī . come pluck the rahrī; My wife's the girl inside the ḍolī .

s.m. f. (?), A well-wheel, the (so-called) Persian wheel (a string of earthen pots attached to a revolving wheel over a well, which go down empty and come up full and tilt the water into a trough: — The commoner form of the word is رهٿ rahaṭ).
more: s. m. An engine for raising water. Same as رهٿ rahaṭ.

def: Tir. n. f. S. अरघट्ट. A revolving wheel for drawing water; the Persian wheel.

s.f. Agency, mercantile correspondence; the business of weighing, selling, or holding in charge the merchandise of dealers; also the remuneration for this service or agency; sale by commission; commission; brokerage.
more: s. f. Agency, commission, brokerage, sale by commission.

def: s.m. Weeds; tares; oats.
E. n. m. Weeds; oats; tares.
s.m. A day-labourer.
s.m. Enemy, foe; a wheel
subs: s.m. Host or army of enemies, or of the enemy
s.m. prop. n. Destroyer or subduer of foes.

def: s.f. (Braj) A woman's female friend; dear, darling; a ridge or mound of earth crossing ditches, dividing fields, &c.; a dike; bank of a river.
wety: Inherited from Prakrit 𑀆𑀭𑀸 (ārā) + Middle Indo-Aryan -𑀇𑀓𑀸- (-ikā-), from Sanskrit आरा॑ (ā́rā).

def: s.m. Protector, supporter; backer; partner; one of a side (in a game).
more: s. A tone or tune in musick.
(see آڙ) part. A protector, defender, supporter.

def: s.f. = آري ārī (dim. of ārā), q.v. s.m. Enemy, foe; a wheel
subs: s.m. Host or army of enemies, or of the enemy
s.m. prop. n. Destroyer or subduer of foes.

def: s.f. A kind of musical mode; a tune (cf. aṛānā).

n. f. 1. Cares; concerns; affairs. 1. Is ghar kī sārī aṛī dhaṛī mere sir hai . Wom. 2. Parāī aṛī dhaṛī apne sir letā phirtā hai . He is always burning his fingers in other people's troubles. 2. Troubles; afflictions; death. Iskī aṛī dhaṛī meṅ Allah kare maiṅ mar jāūṅ . Wom. 3. Good and evil; every thing. Aṛī dhaṛī Qāzī ke sir paṛe . Prov. Whatever happens the Qāzī is responsible.
s.f. A small saw; a shoe-maker's awl.
more: n. f. 1. A small saw. Ek nār woh dāṅt daṅtīlī, Patlī, dublī chhail, chhabīlī, Jab wā tiryā ko lāge bhūk, Hare, sūkhe chabāë rūkh. Kyoṅ rī, sakhī, maiṅ kahāṅ pāūṅ? Ware ā-rī, * maiṅ tujhe batāūṅ . Charade. Ans. ā-rī . A female with projecting teeth, Thin, slim, and janty, wanton, sith That when she's hungry she will chew Alike both green and dry wood too. Now tell me where to find her, pray? Come near me, friend, you've heard me say. 2. A shoe-maker's awl. 3. ( Brij ) Friend; dear ( ālī ).
n. f. The low ridge of land which separates and forms the boundary between two fields; the bank of a river.
(from آرا q. v.) s. f. A small saw, hand saw, an awl.
s. (dakh.) A goad ( Harris ): see the word in the foregoing part.
wety: Inherited from Prakrit 𑀆𑀭𑀸 (ārā) + Middle Indo-Aryan -𑀇𑀓𑀸- (-ikā-), from Sanskrit आरा॑ (ā́rā).

def: s.f. Difficulty, hardship, trouble; need, poverty, distress, adversity, misfortune; exigency, critical situation
more: s. (dakh.) Leap ( Harris ). اڙي مارنا uṛī mārnā, 1. To fly. 2. (dakh.) Jumping from a height into a tank, well, or river ( Qanoon-e-islam, app. p. lvi).
subs: s.f. Difficulties, troubles, cares, concerns, responsibilities; whatever betides; misfortunes, afflictions.

def: = ار ari, q.v. s.m. Enemy, foe; a wheel
more: n. m. One of a side (in a game); a partner. 1. Apne āṛī ko balā lo . 2. Mere mere āṛī, merī taraf . My side, come with me.

n. f. 1. Difficulty; hardship; quagmire; hot water; dead lock. Phr Uphill work; a sea of troubles. 2. Exigency; emergency; crisis; critical situation; the horns of a dilemma. 3. Need; lack ( anhot ); want; straitened circumstances; scarcity ( kamī ); narrow means ( tangī ). 4. Misfortune; distress; wretchedness; affliction ( kam-bakhtī ). 5. Poverty; privation; destitution; indigence; penury; pauperism ( muflisī ). aṛī bhiṛī, aṛe thuṛe, aṛe kaṛe, aṛe waqt , n. Adversity; poverty; difficulty; need. 1. Hamārī aṛī nikāl do . 2. Apnā wohī jo aṛī bhiṛī meṅ kām āë . 3. Mintar woh mar jāë, jo aṛī meṅ kām na āë . Prov. Perish such a friend who serves not in distress. aṛe kām saṅwār'nā , v. a. 1. To remove difficulties; smooth the way; clear the way. 1 A shower (of shoes). * With (his) face down; on the stomach. 2. To extricate; disentangle; disburden; free from. 1. Singh chaṛhī Debī milīṅ, Gaṛuṛ…
m. ( अरे ) interj. (used in calling to or addressing, commonly in a disrespectful way) Holla! ho! O! hear you! sirrah!
f. ( अरे ) interj. (used in calling to or addressing, commonly in a disrespectful way) Holla! ho! O! hear you! sirrah!

s.m. prop. n. Destroyer or subduer of foes.

ety: for A. عار ʻāriṉ, act. part. of عري 'to be naked,' &c.
def: adj. Naked, nude, denuded (of), bare ( = ʻuryān); destitute (of); void (of); free (from); incompetent, incapable (of, or in respect of, -meñ); distressed, distracted, helpless (by reason of, or in consequence of, -se); tired, or weary (of)
more: adj. 1. Tired; wearied; sick of. 2. Undone; ruined; helpless. Kahā karūṅ, maiṅ kā se kahūṅ rī? Maiṅ raṅṛwā ke māre bhaī ārī, Merī pūjā khanḍat kar ḍārī . Wom. Rus. song. What shall I do? to whom complain? All through this cœlebs I'm undone, Polluted all my worship's been. ārī ānā yā h. , v. n. To be tired, disgusted, sick of.
(part. act. of عري Heb. ) adj. Naked, void of, free from.
subs: or ʻārī honā (-se), To be distressed (by), to be helpless (in respect of), to be tired or sick (of), &c.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian عاری ('ārī), from Arabic عَارِي (ʕārī).

def: s.m. Knowing, wise, sagacious, ingenious; skilled in divine matters, possessing knowledge of God and of his kingdom and of the way of dealing well with him; pious, devout; — one skilled in divine things; a holy man, a saint.
more: n. m. 1. A holy man. 2. A saint.
(part. act. of عرف) 1. adj. Wise, sagacious, ingenious, pious, devout. 2. s. m. A holy man. (Plur. عرفا uﻌrafā or عارفين āﻌrifīn ).

def: Arif Wala (a city in Pakpattan district, Punjab, Pakistan)

ety: ʻārif+Zend aff. āna or ana = S. अन
def: adj. & adv. Wise; pious; — wisely, sagaciously, acutely; piously, devoutly.
more: adv. Wisely, acutely, piously, devoutly. adj. Wise, pious.

def: adj. Not wounded; unhurt, unharmed, — s.m. A heron; a crow; a portent, calamity, mistortune; good fortune; a mortal disease; a sign or symptom of approaching death; the nīm-tree (Melia azadirachta); garlic; a woman's lying-in chamber.
= A ارسط و arist̤ū, (Corr. from the Greek), prop. n. The philosopher Aristotle.
n. prop. Aristotle.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian ارسطو (arastū), from Arabic أَرِسْطُو (ʔarisṭū), from Ancient Greek Ἀριστοτέλης (Aristotélēs).

def: = A ارسطاطاليس arist̤āt̤ālīs, (Corr. from the Greek), prop. n. The philosopher Aristotle.
s.f. Bad manners, ill-breeding, impoliteness, incivility.
more: s. f. Impoliteness, incivility, bad manners.

def: s.m. (fem. aritā), Enmity, hostility.
s.m. A plant of the gourd kind.
more: s. m. A plant of the gourd kind.

ety: for A. عاريّة ʻārīyat, rel. n. fr. عارة ʻārat, fr. ěʻārat, 'lending,' inf. n. of iv. of عور 'to take away'
def: s.f. Lending, or borrowing, a thing (which is itself to be returned); loan (of a thing; — syn. udhār, māṅgā; — ʻārīyat differs from qarẓ, inasmuch as in the latter term it is not understood that the identical article borrowed is returned, but simply its equivalent)
more: n. f. عور was blind of an eye, taking away. The loan of a thing. āriyatan' ; H. māṅge , adj. On loan; borrowed. āriyatan denā ; H. māṅge denā , v. a. To lend for use; allow the use of. āriyat lenā ; H. māṅge lenā , v. n. To borrow for use.
(from عور) s. f. Borrowing or lending any thing which is itself to be returned. See ادهار udhār.
subs: v.t. To take on loan, to borrow (for temporary use).

ety: for A. عاريةً, acc. of ʻārīyat
def: adv. Borrowed, on loan (syn. māṅge)
subs: (-ko), To give on loan or for use, to lend, to allow the use of.

def: adj. Borrowed; lent; — factitious, not intrinsic, not one's own, false (as hair, &c.).
more: adj. 1. Borrowed, lent. 2. Factitious, not oneʼs own.

ety: act. part. of عرض 'to be broad'; 'to appear,' &c.
def: part. adj. & s.m. Appearing, showing or presenting itself, happening, befalling, occurring; intervening, preventing, barring; — an occurrence, accident, casualty; an obstacle, impediment, bar; — the side of the face, the cheek; — reviewer of an army or of a body of soldiers, a muster-master; general of an army
more: n. m. Poet . Cheeks. āriz h. , v. n. ءض happened. 1. To befal ( bitnā , 2). Tumheṅ kab se yeh marz āriz huā? 2. ( Law ) To bar; debar; interdict. Dāve ko miād āriz hotī hai .
(from عرض) s. m. 1. The cheek. 2. An accident. 3. A mustermaster, also the general of an army. 4. part. act. Happening, befalling.
subs: s.m. Particulars of receipts or revenues; record of occurrences or accidents; casualty-list
v.n. To show or present itself, to happen, befall (as a fever, &c.); to prove an obstacle (to), to prevent, bar, debar, &c.

def: adj. Broad, wide, expanded, large.

ety: for A. عريضة, fem. of عريض
def: s.m. Humble petition, letter (from an inferior).
more: n. m. A humble petition or letter. ariza-i-niyāz , Yours obediently.

ety: for A. عارضة, fem. of ʻāriẓ, q.v.
def: s.m. An accident, event, &c.; an obstacle, impediment, &c. ( = ʻāriẓ); a fracture; an affection, a disorder, disease, sickness; infirmity, defect; — anything necessary to be done; a want, an object of need (that has occurred to one).
more: n. m. 1. An incident; event. 2. Disorder ( bīmārī ). āri'za-i-jismānī . Infirmity of body. āriza-i-dimāgī . Infirmity of mind. ārza-i-qānūnī . A legal defect.
s. m. Any thing necessary to be done, an accident, an event, an affection.

def: adj. Accidental, not inherent; adventitious, casual.
more: adj. Not real, essential, or inherent.

def: (for A. عارضية, fem. of ʻāriẓī), adj. f. = ʻāriẓī, q.v. adj. Accidental, not inherent; adventitious, casual.

s.f. Worth, value; respect, honour, dignity: — arj-mand [Z. mañṭ; S. mant]. Possessing worth or dignity; noble, illustrious, excellent; worthy, honourable; wise, learned; beloved, dear, precious; unequalled; rare; blessed, happy.
s.f. A Jain woman who leads the life of an ascetic.
s.m. Rectitude, honesty; sincerity, candour.

s.m. A horse having the lower part of one alone of his fore-legs white (or, according to others, any one alone of his legs white, — which is regarded in the East as a serious blemish); — a large-footed man.
more: n. m. A horse having the lower part of one of his fore feet white, which is accounted, among native farriers and dealers, a sign of vice and a great blemish.
s. m. 1. A horse with one white foot. 2. A large-footed man.

def: s.m. Act of acquiring; acquisition; gain, earnings; profits; amassing, accumulating.
more: E. Wom. n. f. S. अर्ज to earn, obtain. Earnings ( kamāī ); acquisition; profits. Saīyāṅ ke arjan, bhaīyā ke nāoṅ, So pehar maiṅ sāsur jāoṅ . E. Wom. Prov. My husband's earnings these, called by my brother's name, I'll wear on visiting my husband's father's hame. ☞ A satire on the wife who is always extolling the munificence and greatness of her own family, insomuch that she does not scruple to represent, as her brother's gifts, jewels bought with her husband's earnings.
s. m. Act of acquiring, gain, acquisition.

def: n. f. S. अरि enemy, जि to conquer. lit . One who subdues her enemies (passions). Jain women who lead an ascetic life.
Argentina (a country in South America)
wety: Perhaps corrupted from English Argentina. Akin to Pashto ارجنټاين (arjanṭāīn).

def: = آراجاري ārā-jārī, q.v. s.f. Coming and going; ingress and egress.
more: n. H. ānā to come, jānā to go. Coming and going; ingress and regress.

def: v.t. caus. of next.
part. Acquired, obtained, earned, gained
v.s.v. ارج arj.
more: adj. Possessing worth or dignity; beloved, dear, noble, excellent, wise, learned, unequalled.

def: v.t. To acquire, obtain, earn, gain.
more: E. v. a. To gain; acquire; obtain; earn ( kamānā ).
v. a. To gain, to acquire.

def: s.m. Name of a hero in the Mahā, bhārat, the third of the Pānḍav princes; — a certain tree, Terminalia alata globra.
more: s. m. 1. Name of a celebrated hero, the third son of Pāṇḍu and friend of Kr̤ish̤ṇa. 2. Name of a tree. (Terminalia alata glabra).

more: n. m. S. अर्क, , Pr. and Pālī. akko . 1. The sun. 2. A plant; Calatropis gigantea . arak-man'ḍal, sūṛaj-man'ḍal , m. The disc of the sun.
s. m. 1. The sun. 2. Name of a plant (swallow-wort. Asclepias or Calotropis gigantea).

def: adj. Bright, clever; sharp, acute; ingenious; strange, wonderful; new, novel. (Cf. arkaṭ.)
more: E. Wom. adj. New; novel; strange; peculiar ( anokhā ). Arkā nāū, bāṅs kī naharnī . † Prov. A new barber, a bamboo razor.

def: s.m. Lit. 'Half a rukā'; a small brass coin of the value of ten kās, or the eighth part of a Madras fanam. (Peculiar to Southern India).
